items.question: Canvas SSO fails because Duo proxy crashed-what do you do?
items.answer: Check monitoring; restart Duo Auth Proxy service; verify failover/LB; confirm Canvas login; capture logs; page IAM on-call if unstable.

follow_ups.question: Where's the runbook/alerts for this?
follow_ups.answer: Team wiki "SSO/Duo Proxy" page + the SSO alert dashboard in [MONITORING TOOL].

follow_ups.question: Does this documentation need to be updated for the Okta rollout?
follow_ups.answer: No, we're still using Duo for this implementation with plans to update in the summer.

items.question: Anderson special billing code errors-what's the legacy fix?
items.answer: Grab error + transaction ID; verify billing-code crosswalk/mapping; get Finance approval if code change; update mapping; reprocess the charge.

items.question: Who owns Salesforce (ross-admissions) admin access, and how do we request/transfer?
items.answer: Ross Apps Services Salesforce Admin team owns it; request via ticket with manager/product-owner approval; grant via permission sets/groups; remove access on last day.

items.question: MiRoss chatbot production dependencies (Slack + LangChain)-what are the main pieces?
items.answer: Slack App/webhook -> bot service -> LangChain (RAG) -> indexed knowledge store -> secrets manager -> logging/monitoring/alerts.

items.question: Slate REST API v2 migration-status and next steps?
items.answer: Inventory done + dev proof-of-concept working; next: implement pagination/retries, parallel-run compare, cutover window, update monitoring/runbook.

items.question: LMS Integration + Data Warehouse RFPs-top requirements/criteria?
items.answer: Must meet security/FERPA, integrate cleanly, be supportable; pick based on compliance pass, fit, TCO, timeline, references, maintainability.

items.question: New data source into Snowflake-process including compliance?
items.answer: Intake + data classification; approvals (data steward/security); build ingestion + quality checks; document/lineage; role-based access; monitor cost/health.

items.question: Tier 1 app urgent contacts-who do we call?
items.answer: Use the on-call list: Canvas (Learning Tech/ITS), Salesforce (SF Admin team), Slate (Admissions Systems), Wolverine Access (ITS), Qualtrics (ITS).

items.question: MiRoss v1.3 memory + PII detection-main compliance risks?
items.answer: Risk of storing/echoing sensitive data + imperfect detection; mitigate with short retention, redaction, restricted access, audits, privacy/security review.

items.question: Known failure modes + fixes: Slate timeout and Salesforce sandbox conflict?
items.answer: Slate: rate limits/pagination/timeouts-add backoff, incremental sync, retries. Salesforce: sandbox refresh/config drift-use refresh checklist, align connected app, redeploy metadata.
